---
title: "04. 止静与内省"
subtitle: "Stillness, Restraint, and Inner Contemplation"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 4
categories: [i-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How 谦、豫、观、遯、艮、渐、归妹、小过 map stillness and restraint onto sparse lawful configurations, Zeckendorf uniqueness, and threshold-aware self-limitation."
---

**Hexagrams:** 谦(15), 豫(16), 观(20), 遯(33), 艮(52), 渐(53), 归妹(54), 小过(62)  
**Omega Directions:** `golden-mean shift`, `Zeckendorf representation`, `rate-distortion`

{{< include articles/category_04_stillness_restraint_contemplation.md >}}

---

[Back to I Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
